title: senna subulata
intro: Senna subulata, also known as the dwarf cassia or Chinese senna, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the legume family and is native to Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate bowel movements and treat digestive issues such as constipation. The health benefits of Senna subulata include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Senna subulata can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to support digestive health and promote overall well-being.
